scripts.dev: rm -f debug.log && npm run build:server && concurrently -n tsc,vite,electron -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client" "VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron server/dist/main.js"
scripts.start: npm run build:server && npm run electron
scripts.start:standalone: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && node server/dist/standalone.js
